[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A grayscale photo shows a person wearing black-framed glasses indoors in front of a wall covered with pencil-drawn sketches and pinned papers.

The main subject is a person with long, dark hair and black-framed glasses, facing the camera. They are standing against a wall and raising one hand near the right side of the frame while the other side of the body is partially visible; their face is softly lit, and their mouth and expression are unclear due to motion blur and the image’s contrast.

The setting appears to be indoors, likely in a room or hallway. The background consists of a gray wall with multiple sheets of paper taped or pinned on it, covered with line drawings of anime-style faces, figures, and outlines. A darker, textured area on the right suggests an attached or adjacent surface.

Visual details include a monochrome/gray filter, strong contrast, and soft motion blur around the raised hand. The person’s clothing includes a dark T-shirt with light-colored printed text or symbols near the chest, and a darker skirt or lower garment with a lighter waistband area. The camera angle is slightly above waist level, shot straight toward the person.

Visible Text: 12.15; Vo; LTE; 40%. No other important visible text detected clearly.

Practical Summary: The image shows a person wearing glasses standing in front of a wall covered with sketch papers. Their raised hand and the image blur make the exact action and facial expression unclear.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
